calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar

Order To Set Hearing For Plaintiff'S Request To File New Litigation By Vexatious Litigant
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Request to File New Litigation by Vexation Litigant is OFF CALENDAR. Litigant submitted a request to file First Amended Complaint, which was denied on August 5, 2015. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Hearing Re Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Off Calendar

Hearing For Plaintiff'S Request To File New Litigation By Vexatious Litigant As To The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Megan Kelly, Esq. (415-398-3344) of Severson & Werson for Defendant/Opposing party The Bank of New York Mellon.
Christine Howson, Esq. (949-720-922) of The Wolf Firm, a Law Corporation for Defendant/Opposing party The Wolf Firm, a Law Corporation.
No appearance by Planitiff/Moving party.

No arguments heard. Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Request To File New Litigation By Vexatious Litigant As To The First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

The August 17, 2015 hearing for Plaintiff's request for Order to Show Cause re: TRO is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Hearing Re Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Continued To Aug-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
